# Security Policy

## Reporting Security Vulnerabilities

Please report any security bugs found in the source code of this project through the [Patchstack Vulnerability Disclosure Program](https://patchstack.com/database/vdp/e70e28e9-1470-4c6a-b52d-e05fbd68a516).

The Patchstack team will assist with verification, CVE assignment, and will notify the developers of this project to ensure a timely fix.
